name: Scallops in Sesame Marinade
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Fresh sea scallops, rinse and pat dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag, mix all ingredients except the scallops.
2. Add the scallops and refrigerate overnight.
3. Thread the scallops onto metal skewers, reserving the marinade.
4. Spread medium hot coals in a circle with an opening in the middle.
5. Position the skewers over the open center.
6. Cover; grill for 6-8 minutes or until the scallops are opaque.
7. Turn and brush with marinade while cooking.
